info.name: BuildSmart - Safety Service Complete Test Suite
info.description: Complete test suite for the BuildSmart Safety Service routed through the API Gateway at port 9090. Includes Auth (login for all roles), Project creation, Incidents, Inspections, and Notifications — with happy paths and every error/edge case handled by the service.

variable.description: Auto-set by the Admin Login request
Auto-set by the Safety Officer Login request
Auto-set by the Project Manager Login request
Active token used by all requests — set this after login
Safety officer user ID for notification tests

item.name: AUTH - Login
item.description: Login requests for all roles. Run the appropriate one first and copy the token into the 'token' collection variable.

request.description: Login with ADMIN credentials. Token is auto-saved to adminToken and token variables.
Login with SAFETY_OFFICER credentials. Token is auto-saved to officerToken and token variables.
Login with PROJECT_MANAGER credentials. Token is auto-saved to managerToken and token variables.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized — incorrect password.
Expected: 404 Not Found — user does not exist.
Expected: 400 Bad Request — email is required.
Register a new user. Adjust the role field to ADMIN, SAFETY_OFFICER, or PROJECT_MANAGER.
Expected: 409 Conflict — email already registered.

item.name: PROJECTS - Project Management
item.description: Project creation and retrieval via the project-manager-service, routed through the API gateway. Used to get a valid projectId before testing safety endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "projectName": "BuildSmart Tower Phase 1",
  "description": "High-rise construction project at city centre",
  "startDate": "2026-05-01",
  "endDate": "2027-12-31",
  "location": "Colombo 03",
  "budget": 5000000
}

request.description: Create a new project. The projectId is auto-saved to the collection variable for use in safety tests. Requires ADMIN or PROJECT_MANAGER token.
Expected: 400 Bad Request — projectName is required.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized — no JWT provided.

item.name: Create Project - Wrong Role - Safety Officer (403)

request.description: Expected: 403 Forbidden — SAFETY_OFFICER cannot create projects.
Retrieve a project by its ID. Used to verify the project exists before running safety tests.
Expected: 404 Not Found — project does not exist.
List all projects. Use this to find a valid projectId for testing.

item.name: INCIDENTS - Happy Path
item.description: All successful incident operations. Run these with a valid SAFETY_OFFICER or ADMIN token.

request.description: Report a new safety incident. incidentId is auto-saved. Requires authenticated user.
Retrieve a single incident by ID.

item.name: Search Incidents - Filter by Status OPEN
Search Incidents - Filter by Severity HIGH
Search Incidents - Filter by Date Range
Update Incident Status - OPEN to UNDER_INVESTIGATION

request.description: Requires SAFETY_OFFICER or ADMIN token.

item.name: Update Incident Status - UNDER_INVESTIGATION to RESOLVED
Update Incident Status - RESOLVED to CLOSED

request.description: Create a fresh OPEN incident first, then run this. Requires SAFETY_OFFICER or ADMIN.

item.name: INCIDENTS - Validation Errors (400)
item.description: All 400 Bad Request scenarios for incident endpoints.

request.description: Expected: 400 — projectId is required.
Expected: 400 — description must not be blank.
Expected: 400 — severity is required.

item.name: Create Incident - Invalid severity enum value

request.description: Expected: 400 INVALID_ENUM_VALUE — allowed values: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL.
Expected: 400 — description must not exceed 5000 characters.
Expected: 400 VALIDATION_ERROR — multiple field errors in one response.

item.name: Update Incident Status - Invalid enum value (400)

request.description: Expected: 400 — PENDING is not a valid IncidentStatus.

item.name: Get Incident - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Update Incident Status - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Delete Incident - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Create Incident - projectId does not exist in project-service

request.description: Expected: 404 DOWNSTREAM_NOT_FOUND — project does not exist in project-manager-service.

item.name: INCIDENTS - Invalid Status Transitions (422)
item.description: All INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION scenarios. The service enforces: OPEN -> UNDER_INVESTIGATION -> RESOLVED -> CLOSED.

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. Run on a freshly created (OPEN) incident.

item.name: OPEN to CLOSED - Skip all steps

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION.
Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. First move incident to RESOLVED.

item.name: CLOSED to OPEN - Reopen a terminal incident

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. First move incident to CLOSED.

item.name: Delete Incident - Status is not OPEN (403)

request.description: Expected: 403 UNAUTHORIZED_OPERATION — only OPEN incidents can be deleted. Move the incident to UNDER_INVESTIGATION first, then try deleting.

item.name: INCIDENTS - Auth and Role Errors (401 / 403)
item.description: Authorization and role-based access checks for incident endpoints.

request.description: Expected: 401 Unauthorized.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized — token is expired or signature invalid.

item.name: Update Incident Status - Project Manager role (403)

request.description: Expected: 403 ACCESS_DENIED — PROJECT_MANAGER cannot update incident status.
Expected: 403 ACCESS_DENIED — PROJECT_MANAGER cannot delete incidents.
No token required. Returns list of all valid InspectionType enum values for dropdowns.
Requires SAFETY_OFFICER or ADMIN token. inspectionId is auto-saved.

item.name: Search Inspections - Filter by Status SCHEDULED
Search Inspections - Filter by Date Range
Update Inspection Status - SCHEDULED to IN_PROGRESS
Update Inspection Status - IN_PROGRESS to COMPLETED
Update Inspection Status - IN_PROGRESS to NON_COMPLIANT

request.description: Move to IN_PROGRESS first. Branches off from COMPLETED path.

item.name: Update Inspection Status - COMPLETED to CLOSED
Update Inspection Status - NON_COMPLIANT to CLOSED

request.description: Move to NON_COMPLIANT first, then close.
Create a fresh inspection first. Only SCHEDULED inspections can be deleted.

item.name: INSPECTIONS - Validation Errors (400)
item.description: All 400 Bad Request scenarios for inspection endpoints.

request.description: Expected: 400 — projectId is required.
Expected: 400 — inspectionType is required.
Expected: 400 INVALID_ENUM_VALUE — allowed values listed in response.

item.name: Create Inspection - Findings too short (under 20 chars)

request.description: Expected: 400 — findings must be between 20 and 200 characters.

item.name: Create Inspection - Findings too long (over 200 chars)

request.description: Expected: 400 — findings must be between 20 and 200 characters.
Expected: 400 — findings is required.
Expected: 400 VALIDATION_ERROR — multiple field errors.

item.name: Update Inspection Status - Invalid enum value

request.description: Expected: 400 — DONE is not a valid InspectionStatus.

item.name: Get Inspection - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Update Inspection Status - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Delete Inspection - ID does not exist

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.

item.name: Create Inspection - projectId does not exist in project-service

request.description: Expected: 404 DOWNSTREAM_NOT_FOUND — project does not exist in project-manager-service.

item.name: INSPECTIONS - Invalid Status Transitions (422)
item.description: All INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION scenarios. Valid flow: SCHEDULED -> IN_PROGRESS -> COMPLETED or NON_COMPLIANT -> CLOSED.

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. Run on a freshly created (SCHEDULED) inspection.
Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION.

item.name: SCHEDULED to CLOSED - Skip all steps

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION.
Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. Move to IN_PROGRESS first.

item.name: CLOSED to IN_PROGRESS - Reopen terminal inspection

request.description: Expected: 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION. Move to CLOSED first.

item.name: Delete Inspection - Status is not SCHEDULED (403)

request.description: Expected: 403 UNAUTHORIZED_OPERATION — only SCHEDULED inspections can be deleted. Move to IN_PROGRESS first, then try deleting.

item.name: INSPECTIONS - Duplicate and Auth Errors
item.description: Conflict and role-based access checks for inspections.

item.name: Create Inspection - Duplicate same type same day same project (409)

request.description: Expected: 409 DUPLICATE_RESOURCE. Run this after already creating a FIRE_SAFETY inspection for the same project on the same day.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized.
Expected: 403 ACCESS_DENIED — PROJECT_MANAGER cannot schedule inspections.

item.name: Update Inspection Status - Project Manager role (403)

request.description: Expected: 403 ACCESS_DENIED — PROJECT_MANAGER cannot update inspection status.
Expected: 403 ACCESS_DENIED — PROJECT_MANAGER cannot delete inspections.

item.name: NOTIFICATIONS - Happy Path
item.description: All notification endpoints. Notifications are auto-generated by the backend when incidents or inspections are created or their status changes.

request.description: Returns all notifications for a user. First notificationId is auto-saved.
Returns: { unreadCount: N }
Marks a single notification as read. Returns the updated notification.

item.name: Mark All Notifications as Read for User

request.description: Returns: { markedCount: N }

item.name: Mark Notification as Read - ID does not exist (404)

request.description: Expected: 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized.
Expected: 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: Get Notifications - User with no notifications (empty array)

request.description: Expected: 200 OK with empty array [].
